chain.thought: Explanation: The elapsed time is given as d:hh:mm:ss. Yachts with at least 3 days are rows 3–10 (3:06:02:29, 3:06:11:29, 3:09:19:00, 3:11:00:26, 3:14:41:28, 3:14:58:46, 3:15:28:24, 3:16:04:40), totaling 8 yachts.

judge_thought: Explanation: The elapsed times are in d:hh:mm:ss. Rows 1 (2:19:03:32) and 2 (2:21:55:06) are under 3 days. Rows 3 through 10 all have at least 3 days (starting at 3:06:02:29 and longer). That totals 8 yachts with times of at least 3 days.
